description.value: > Truth Associated Subdomain: Madness. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the aura of madness power of the Madness domain. Dawning Realization (Su) At 8th level, you can impart a shared vision of unfathomable ineffability to a living creature you touch as a standard action, after which your turn immediately ends. You are dazed and the target confused for 1 round by what you both learn. On the following round, you are both staggered for 1 round by the ramifications of your discovery. On the third round, you are confused and the target dazed for 1 round as you attempt to regain your bearings. Each round, the target can attempt a Will save with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier to negate that roundâs effects for both of you, though the effect does not end until the end of the third round. This is a mind-affecting effect that you can use a number of times per day equal to 1/2 your class level. Replacement Domain Spells: 3rdâ wall of nausea, 5thâ contact other plane, 6thâ litany of madness.
